title: artwork feedback
description: Tell us what you think about the artwork
selectPageTitle: Choose questions for your feedback form
selectPageHint: Uncheck any question you don't want on this form. The preview matches how they will look to respondents (answers are disabled here).

questions.label: How sharp is the lineart in the artwork
questions.detail:
Sharp Lineart is usually well defined, bleeds less
 blurry lineart usually is dull

questions.label: What parts of the artwork you liked?
What are some areas of improvement in this artwork
In a few words, what mood does this piece give you?
questions.detail: Keep it brief — answers are limited to 140 characters.

questions.label: What is the first feature of the artwork that stood out to you?
questions.detail: Composition is about the layout of the artwork and how the subjects of an artwork are arranged.
